specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Microsoft® Windows® XP / Vista / 7 or higher
  • Processor: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or higher
  • Memory: 256 MB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 8.1
  • Storage: 150 MB available space

Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 4th generation or equivalent
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better (DirectX 9 compatible)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: The game is designed to run at 30 FPS. Please note that performance may be significantly reduced on low-end CPUs such as Intel Atom or Pentium N-series processors.
specification.recommended:

  • Processor: Intel Core i5 or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated GPU or newer Intel integrated graphics
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
